catch (InvalidOperationException ex) when (
    ex.Message.Contains("D365 staging save failed after retry exhaustion"))
{
    _logger.LogError(
        ex,
        "DIA Dataverse staging save failed after retry exhaustion. FileName: {FileName}",
        payload.FileName);

    await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyRetryExhaustedAsync(
        payload.FileName,
        "D365DataverseSaveFailure",
        ex,
        cancellationToken);

    throw;
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    _logger.LogError(ex, "PGP TRACE: staging/decrypt block failed");
    throw;
}
